observation.images.exterior_image.comment: Exterior scene view (over_shoulder_left). Maps to the model's base_0_rgb.

observation.images.wrist_image.comment: Wrist view (Robotiq base_link/wrist_cam). Maps to the model's left_wrist_0_rgb.

observation.text.comment: Task instruction (default/vague/specific variant chosen at launch).

observation.state.arm_joint_pos.comment: Absolute Panda arm joint positions. Matches the DROID pi0.5 joint-state proprio (the agent concatenates + zero-pads to the model's 32).

action.arm_joint_vel.comment: 7 Panda arm joint VELOCITY targets (DroidJointVelocityActionCfg, built from IsaacLab JointVelocityActionCfg). Pairs with DROID pi0.5's joint-velocity action.

action.gripper.comment: Binary gripper: >0.5 closes (finger_joint -> pi/4), else opens.

comment: RoboLab DROID env in its joint-velocity configuration (env_server.py --control joint_vel): same embodiment/observations as droid.json, but the action is 7 arm joint velocities + binary gripper. This is the artifact that pairs with the official DROID pi0.5 (lerobot/pi05_droid): action signature JOINT_VEL+JOINT_ABS_POS matches, AND the joint-space proprio matches the model's joint-state input. For the env's native joint-position action see droid.json.
